content.text:
All 7 files have been created. Here's a summary of what was built under `extensions/pulseboard/`:

---

### Files created

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `package.json` | Package metadata with `@openclaw/pulseboard` name, `"module"` type, and full `openclaw` block (channel id/label/selectionLabel/docsPath/blurb, extensions, setupEntry) |
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest — `id: "pulseboard"`, `channels: ["pulseboard"]`, minimal `configSchema` |
| `src/types.ts` | `PulseBoardAccount`, `PulseBoardConfig`, and `PulseBoardMessage` interfaces |
| `src/runtime.ts` | `createPluginRuntimeStore<PluginRuntime>` with error `"PulseBoard runtime not initialized"`, exporting `getPulseBoardRuntime` / `setPulseBoardRuntime` |
| `src/channel.ts` | `pulseBoardPlugin` built with `createChatChannelPlugin` — meta via `getChatChannelMeta("pulseboard")`, capabilities `{chatTypes: ["direct","group"], media: false}`, reload prefix, stub config/setup/gateway/messaging adapters, and outbound with `deliveryMode: "direct"` / `textChunkLimit: 4000` / stub `sendText` returning `{channel, to, accountId, messageId}` |
| `index.ts` | `defineChannelPluginEntry({id, name, description, plugin, setRuntime})` default export |
| `setup-entry.ts` | `defineSetupPluginEntry(pulseBoardPlugin)` default export |

The structure mirrors `extensions/nostr/` for simplicity (no extra local barrels needed since everything routes through the plugin SDK directly), while the naming and plugin contract follow the established OpenClaw channel plugin pattern.

| `package.json` | Package metadata with `@openclaw/pulseboard` name, `"module"` type, and full `openclaw` block (channel id/label/selectionLabel/docsPath/blurb, extensions, setupEntry) |
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest — `id: "pulseboard"`, `channels: ["pulseboard"]`, minimal `configSchema` |
| `src/types.ts` | `PulseBoardAccount`, `PulseBoardConfig`, and `PulseBoardMessage` interfaces |
